productDisplayName: Puma Men Basket II Takeahike Black Shoes
description: These stylish Basket II Takeahike shoes from puma are a fresh take on the Basket Classics. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Combination of synthetic leather, fabric and suede uppers for durability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on the side and behind collar Formstripe on the sides in suede Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVa midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a cross-thatch pattern for greater traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
